title: P-101 grinding noise (possible bearing/impeller damage) - UNDO_TEST_1773920856742 - UNDO_TEST_1773920972236 - UNDO_TEST_1773921084536
failure_mode: Abnormal noise (grinding) due to bearing failure or internal rubbing
cause: Likely bearing degradation, impeller-to-casing rub from misalignment, debris ingestion, or inadequate lubrication
recommended_actions: Inspect pump bearings and lubrication condition; check for overheating and replace bearings if rough/noisy
Check coupling alignment and shaft runout; inspect impeller/casing wear rings for rubbing damage and correct clearances
Check suction strainer and pump internals for debris/foreign material; flush/clean as needed

title: P-101 high vibration
cause: Possible impeller imbalance, misalignment, looseness, bearing wear, or cavitation
recommended_actions: Verify operating conditions (flow/suction pressure) and check for cavitation; correct suction restrictions if found
Inspect and correct alignment/soft foot; check for looseness at base, coupling, and hold-down bolts
Collect vibration/bearing condition data and inspect bearings/impeller for wear or damage; repair/replace as needed

title: Cooling Water Pump P-101 overheating
cause: Likely inadequate cooling/lubrication, operation off-design (deadhead/low flow), bearing distress, or coupling/misalignment increasing load
recommended_actions: Verify pump is not deadheaded/low-flow; confirm discharge valve position and minimum flow/bypass is open as required
Check bearing temperature/lube oil or grease condition and verify cooling water/flush (if applicable) is flowing
Inspect coupling alignment and motor current/overload; stop and isolate pump if temperature continues to rise

title: Cooling Water Pump P-101 mechanical seal leak
cause: Likely worn/damaged mechanical seal faces or O-rings; possible misalignment or seal flush issue
recommended_actions: Inspect seal area and confirm leak rate; check seal flush/pressure and shaft alignment
Plan seal repair/replace (seal faces, O-rings) and inspect shaft sleeve for scoring
Verify correct operating conditions (suction pressure/NPSH, vibration) to prevent repeat seal failure
